fields.description:
当社のデバイスを簡単に見つけ、使用方法を習得し、顧客の生活にシームレスに統合できるようにすることで、市場シェアを拡張する。

骨伝導補聴器には社会的な偏見があることは注目すべき点です。私たちは、スマートなデザインと経済的な効率性によって、この偏見を克服することを目指しています。　ｓｓｓ
fields.name: 適合性

fields.description: 13歳-18歳の患者より、2017年度比較64%の収益向上
fields.name: 13歳-17歳

fields.description: 増加 から収入をFY 2024 56％、18〜24成人患者 170cm以上
fields.name: Adults 18-24

fields.description: Increase revenue from among adult patients 25-34 by 38% by FY 2017.
fields.name: Adults 25-34/  ２５歳～３４歳

fields.name: North America

fields.description: Increase market share in South America by 64% by 2017.

fields.description: 顧客は装置が彼らの生活とシームレスに統合することを望んでいます。これにはデバイス自体だけでなく、デバイスを取り巻くテクノロジも含まれます。
fields.name: 有用性

fields.description: Off the shelf, our devices cost an average of $10,000. Through increased efficiency in our use of technology and better materials, drop the average off the shelf price by 50% by the end of the 2017 fiscal year.
fields.name: Low-Cost, High-Quality

fields.description: 新しいアイテム
fields.name: テスト
デバイス・インテグレーション

fields.description:
市販されている補聴器の多くは、補聴器とAndroidデバイスの間で音声をやり取りするためにペンダントまたはその他のデバイスを必要とします。より若い患者、特にGoogleに焦点を当てている患者の間で市場シェアを拡大​​したいのであれば、Androidと直接統合する方法を見つける必要があります。

新バージョン

記述
fields.name: アンドロイド・インテグレーション

fields.description: Many hearing aid on the market require a pendant or other device to transfer sound between the hearing aid and the iOS device. If we want to increase market share amongst younger patients, especially those who are Apple-focused, we need to find a way to directly integrate with iOS.
fields.name: iOS Integration

fields.description:
Many hearing aid on the market require a pendant or other device to transfer sound between the hearing aid and the SymbianOS. If we want to increase market share amongst younger patients in Asia, primarily Japan, we need to find a way to directly integrate with SymbianOS.

 

Symboan -> Android  Configure
fields.name: SymbianOS Integration

fields.description: Many hearing aids on the market require a pendant or other device to transfer sound between the hearing aid and the Windows device. If we want to increase market share amongst younger patients, especially those who are Windows-focused, we need to find a way to directly integrate with Windows.
fields.name: Windows Integration

fields.description:
補聴器は、耐久性があり頑丈なものから、小型で薄く目立たないものまであります。35歳以下の層の市場シェアを獲得するには、アクティブなライフスタイルを反映した補聴器が必要です。

 

耐久性は、幅広い活動分野をカバーします。例えば、

  • 現在、接触スポーツ中は、補聴器を取り外し、アバットメントを覆わなければなりません。
  • t時には、特に注意が必要です。
  • 様々な気象条件（風（ほこり）、湿度など）が補聴器に悪影響を及ぼす可能性があります。
fields.name: 耐久性

fields.description: aaa
fields.name: NewONe

fields.description:
A waterproof device is vital to increasing our market share. There's a large market, especially in the United States, that could be taken over through creation of a waterproof device.

 

This also would increase our ability to attract and retain retain younger customers, and may affect our ability to retain older as well.

 

I have changed

Currently, processor specifically is not waterproof, so it has to be removed or covered with a special cover prior to showering or swimming.
fields.name: Waterproof

fields.description: There are times when our patients will turn off their hearing needs in order to get silence, or be able to concentrate more. During these times, or during times of other loud noises, there should be a way for our patients to recognize that there is a need for them to pay attention and turn on their hearing device. By providing haptic feedback, we can alert them in a not overly-distracting way.
fields.name: Haptic Feedback

fields.description: To minimize impact to the patient's life, surgery shall be single stage.
fields.name: Surgical Installation

fields.description: Average hearing gain in a free field pure tone audiogram should be in 31 +/- 10 dB.
fields.name: Hearing Gain in Free Field Pure Tone Audiogram

fields.description: The suprathreshold speech perception at 65 dB in free field pure tone audiogram should increase to 65-85%.
fields.name: Suprathreshold Speech Perception

fields.name: サブシステム要件　#122

fields.description:
The hearing aid should be more adoptable than other comparable hearing aids.  This will be validated by using a patient focus group.  A patient from the group will be given a set of tasks and the time to complete the tasks will be measured.

 

Each step in the validation is a separate patient.
fields.name: Intuitive Design - Battery Replacement

testCaseSteps.action: Give the user a packaged battery and measure the time it takes them to insert the battery into the device
Give a second user a packaged battery and have them watch a 1 minute video describing the battery replacement
Give the second user a packaged battery and measure the time it takes them to insert the battery and re-attach the device

fields.description: Part of adoptability is ease of use and intuitive design.  In this validation, a focus group of user will be asked if they can identify the meaning of the graphic labels on the device.  We expect 80% of group members to indicate the correct meaning within 5 seconds of viewing the graphic
fields.name: Intuitive Design - Common Labelling

testCaseSteps.action: Display "Mobile App Icon" label to patient

fields.description: Patients should be able to easily complete personal hygiene activities without interference from the hearing aid.  A focus group of patients will be used to conduct the validation.
fields.name: Ease of Personal Hygiene - Bathing

testCaseSteps.action: Distribute the hearing aid to 10 patients
Survey patients to determine any issues involved with bathing

fields.description: Patients should be able to wash their face
fields.name: Ease of Personal Hygiene - Face

testCaseSteps.action: Distribute hearing aid to 10 patients soon after surgery
Have the patients wash their faces with the hearing aid attached
testCaseSteps.expectedResult: Patients are able to wash in less than 1 minute with no reports of discomfort

testCaseSteps.action: Have the patients wash their faces with the hearing aid unattached
testCaseSteps.expectedResult: Patients are able to wash in less than 1 minute with no reports of discomfort

fields.description: The hearing aid should have manual controls that are of a sufficient size and location to allow for easy manipulation by patients
fields.name: Manual Controls

testCaseSteps.action: Take a "new patient" and measure how long it takes them to attach the hearing aid
testCaseSteps.expectedResult: patient is able to attach device in less than 10 seconds
testCaseSteps.notes: A new patient is one that's has not been released from the hospital after surgery

fields.description: Patients should be able to brush their teeth with the hearing aid connected
fields.name: Oral Hygien

testCaseSteps.action: Distribute the hearing aid to 10 patients
Have the patients brush their teeth with the hearing aid connected
testCaseSteps.expectedResult: All patients are able to brush their teeth without any hestitation

fields.name: システム検証プロトコル

testCaseSteps.action: Ensure water is less than or equal to 75F
Sound processor meets minimum requirements for release
Confirm settings are up to MIL-STD-80
Confirm device still works at production settings

fields.name: Collect SME data on single versus double stage

testCaseSteps.action: Dr. Adams agrees single stage is what is best for the prospective patient.
Dr. Clyde agrees single stage is what is best for the prospective patient.
Dr. Jacob agrees single stage is what is best for the prospective patient.
Dr. Hala agrees single stage is what is best for the prospective patient.
Dr. Prudden agrees single stage is what is best for the prospective patient.

fields.description: Infection, which can lead to death.
fields.detection_method$90: Observation of the implant site. Testing of blood.
fields.name: Bacterial infection
fields.rationale$90: During or after surgery, the patient can be exposed to microorganisms through contact with the air, infected caregivers, surgical instruments, or the device itself. We are primarily concerned with exposure because of the device itself.

fields.description: When osseointegraton fails, the implant must be removed and cannot be re-implanted for 9-12 months.
fields.detection_method$90: Body's rejection of the foreign matter by outgrowth.
fields.name: Implant doesn't integrate with bone because of patient movement
fields.rationale$90: Patient movement (sleeping, general movements throughout the day) could affect the implant.

fields.description: When osseointegraton fails, the implant must be removed and cannot be re-implanted for 9-12 months.
fields.detection_method$90: Body's rejection of the foreign matter by outgrowth.
fields.name: Implant doesn't integrate with bone because of external impacts

fields.description: Open wound leading to illness or death.
fields.name: Loss of osseointegrated fixture
